functions.name: onPublish
functions.description: This function handles the 'Entry Publish' webhook event from Contentful to update any pending Mux Asset data in Mux, based on entries in Contentful.

functions.name: getSignedUrlTokens
functions.description: This action returns signed JWT tokens for securing Mux video playback.

functions.name: getAsset
functions.description: Fetches a Mux asset by ID.

functions.name: createAsset
functions.description: Creates a new Mux asset from a URL or upload settings.

functions.name: createUpload
functions.description: Creates a Mux direct upload URL.

functions.name: getUpload
functions.description: Fetches a Mux upload by ID to check its status.

functions.name: deleteStaticRendition
functions.description: Deletes a static MP4 rendition from a Mux asset.

functions.name: createStaticRendition
functions.description: Creates a static MP4 rendition for a Mux asset.

functions.name: createTrack
functions.description: Adds a caption or audio track to a Mux asset.

functions.name: deleteTrack
functions.description: Deletes a track from a Mux asset.

functions.name: generateSubtitles
functions.description: Generates auto-captions for a Mux asset track.

functions.name: getSigningKey
functions.description: Validates that a Mux signing key exists.

functions.name: createSigningKey
functions.description: Creates a new Mux signing key for signed URLs.
